title: angelica grayi
intro: Angelica grayi, also known as Angelica sinensis or Dong quai, is a perennial plant native to China, and it belongs to the carrot family (Apiaceae). The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Angelica grayi include relieving menstrual cramps, improving cardiovascular health, and reducing symptoms of menopause, as well as its potential to boost the immune system and reduce inflammation. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, capsules, and tinctures, making it a popular ingredient in herbal supplements.
intro_study: According to "Frontiers in pharmacology", angelica grayi, also known as Angelicae Pubescentis Radix (APR), has been shown to have numerous benefits, including effective analgesic and anti-inflammatory actions, as well as effects on the central nervous system, cardiovascular system, and deworming activity.
